'''Stikmoss''' was a kind of gray moss grown by [[Spero]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}}
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' abridged audiobook]]
